speaker: CHORUS
text: Vouchsafe to those that have not read the story

speaker: CHORUS
text: That I may prompt them; and of such as have,

speaker: CHORUS
text: I humbly pray them to admit th’ excuse

speaker: CHORUS
text: Of time, of numbers, and due course of things,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Which cannot in their huge and proper life

speaker: CHORUS
text: Be here presented. Now we bear the King

speaker: CHORUS
text: Toward Calais. Grant him there. There seen,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Heave him away upon your wingèd thoughts

speaker: CHORUS
text: Athwart the sea. Behold, the English beach

speaker: CHORUS
text: Pales in the flood with men, wives, and boys,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Whose shouts and claps outvoice the deep-mouthed sea,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Which, like a mighty whiffler ’fore the King

speaker: CHORUS
text: Seems to prepare his way. So let him land,

speaker: CHORUS
text: And solemnly see him set on to London.

speaker: CHORUS
text: So swift a pace hath thought that even now

speaker: CHORUS
text: You may imagine him upon Blackheath,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Where that his lords desire him to have borne

speaker: CHORUS
text: His bruisèd helmet and his bended sword

speaker: CHORUS
text: Before him through the city. He forbids it,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Being free from vainness and self-glorious pride,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Giving full trophy, signal, and ostent

speaker: CHORUS
text: Quite from himself, to God. But now behold,

speaker: CHORUS
text: In the quick forge and workinghouse of thought,

speaker: CHORUS
text: How London doth pour out her citizens.

speaker: CHORUS
text: The Mayor and all his brethren in best sort,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Like to the senators of th’ antique Rome,

speaker: CHORUS
text: With the plebeians swarming at their heels,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Go forth and fetch their conqu’ring Caesar in—

speaker: CHORUS
text: As, by a lower but by loving likelihood

speaker: CHORUS
text: Were now the general of our gracious empress,

speaker: CHORUS
text: As in good time he may, from Ireland coming,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Bringing rebellion broachèd on his sword,

speaker: CHORUS
text: How many would the peaceful city quit

speaker: CHORUS
text: To welcome him! Much more, and much more cause,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Did they this Harry. Now in London place him

speaker: CHORUS
text: (As yet the lamentation of the French

speaker: CHORUS
text: Invites the King of England’s stay at home;

speaker: CHORUS
text: The Emperor’s coming in behalf of France

speaker: CHORUS
text: To order peace between them) and omit

speaker: CHORUS
text: All the occurrences, whatever chanced,

speaker: CHORUS
text: Till Harry’s back return again to France.

speaker: CHORUS
text: There must we bring him, and myself have played

speaker: CHORUS
text: The interim, by remembering you ’tis past.

speaker: CHORUS
text: Then brook abridgment, and your eyes advance

speaker: CHORUS
text: After your thoughts, straight back again to France.
